description: Use this API to change the contour parameters for the contour in the active Slider diagram in the GUI. Requires a current network case. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. changediagcontour(element, quantity, method, color, enable, res, influence, bound, max, min)
python_syntax: changediagcontour(element, quantity, method, color, enable, res, influence, bound, max, min)

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: Item to be contoured e.g. buses, branches, machines. (input).

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Element quantity to generate the contour on. (input).

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Algorithm used to generate the contour. (input).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Color gradiant to use for the contour. (input).

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: “switch” used to toggle the contour on/off. (input).

parameters.name: res
parameters.description: Resolution of the contour (10 to 2000). a higher resolution will result in greater computation times. . (input).

parameters.name: influence
parameters.description: Influence range (1 to 100). a larger range will result in greater blending. (input).

parameters.name: bound
parameters.description: Value that controls how far beyond the outermost elements on the diagram the contour extends. (input).

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Maximum “quantity” value associated with the “high” color. (input).

parameters.name: min
parameters.description: Minimum “quantity” value associated with the “low” color. (input).
